installConfigs.instructions: Connects to Grafana Cloud's hosted MCP server. Replace <your-grafana-service-account-token> with a Grafana service account token (sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>') and <https://your-instance.grafana.net> with your Grafana Cloud instance URL (sent in the X-Grafana-URL header). For self-managed Grafana, switch to the Docker-based local server: command 'docker', args ['run','-i','--rm','-e','GRAFANA_URL','-e','GRAFANA_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN','docker.io/grafana/mcp-grafana:latest'], env with GRAFANA_URL and GRAFANA_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN.

Connects to Grafana Cloud's hosted MCP server. Replace <your-grafana-service-account-token> with a Grafana service account token (sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>') and <https://your-instance.grafana.net> with your Grafana Cloud instance URL (sent in the X-Grafana-URL header). For self-managed Grafana, switch to the Docker-based local server: command 'docker', args ['run','-i','--rm','-e','GRAFANA_URL','-e','GRAFANA_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN','docker.io/grafana/mcp-grafana:latest'], env with GRAFANA_URL and GRAFANA_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN.
